form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 4th on April 7 over 410m at this track behind Waxing beaten 4.5 lengths (23.53) in a Grade 5. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warrnambool over 390m. Last start finished 7th over 410m at this track beaten 10 lengths (24.25) behind Super Symon in a Grade 5 on April 7. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Returns from a spell and worth noting was a winner when last resuming, scoring over 512m at Mt Gambier. Looks a place chance at best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin and raced wide turning into home straight.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3.5 lengths third at Bendigo but did record a brilliant 23.87 for the 425m trip. Looms as the one to beat this time.
